series_metadata.series_description: Correspondence authorized by the board's executive director or a member of the board dealing with significant aspects of the administration of the agency. Correspondence includes all written memoranda, letters, and position papers whether on paper or in electronic format.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: two (2) years post expiration of board member or executive director''s service, and ; Paper: two (2) years post expiration of board member or executive director''s service, and
